judge.reason: Primary purpose is allocation and initialization of a new aio_kiocb (slab allocation, context limit check, percpu_ref_get on ctx, field initialization including refcount_set to 2). Refcount setting is one step among many, making it a constructor/allocation function, not primarily a reference-count wrapper.
